dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HCON 68 IH: To direct the removal of United States Armed Forces from Venezuela that have not been authorized by Congress.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. McGovern (for himself and Mr. Massie) submitted the following concurrent resolution; which was referred to the Committee on Foreign Affairs

form.official-title: To direct the removal of United States Armed Forces from Venezuela that have not been authorized by Congress.

section.header: Removal of the use of United States forces for hostilities within or against Venezuela
section.text: Pursuant to section 5(c) of the War Powers Resolution (50 U.S.C. 1544(c)), Congress hereby directs the President to remove United States Armed Forces from Venezuela, unless explicitly authorized by a declaration of war or specific statutory authorization for use of military force.
